name: Breath into Dust
oracleText:
Create a 3/3 green Human creature token.
You gain 3 life.
flavorText: "And the Lord God formed man of the dust of the ground, and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life; and man became a living soul." — Genesis 2:7
notes: Early World iconic event card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons public-domain file page for Michelangelo's The Creation of Adam.
